revision.text: {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=CopySectLink |desc=Adds a button to copy the unencoded page title or section path next to each heading |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/CopySectLink.js]] }} This script adds a button that copies the unencoded page title (with spaces, not underscores) or section path (with #) to your clipboard so it can be pasted as a clean wikilink, next to the [{{fake link|edit}}] link in each heading. If the edit link doesn't exist, it creates its own brackets. You may also copy the full URL by right-clicking the button and selecting your browser's native "Copy link" option. ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/CopySectLink.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. {{User:Nardog/scripts}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:User:Nardog/CopySectLink]]
revision.text: {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=CopySectLink |desc=Adds a button to copy the unencoded page title or section path next to each heading |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/CopySectLink.js]] }} This script adds a button that copies the unencoded page title (with spaces, not underscores) or section path (with #) to your clipboard so it can be pasted as a clean wikilink, next to the [{{fake link|edit}}] link in each heading. If the edit link doesn't exist, it creates its own brackets. You may also copy the full URL by right-clicking the button and selecting your browser's native "Copy link" option. ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/CopySectLink.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. {{User:Nardog/scripts}}

{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=CopySectLink |desc=Adds a button to copy the unencoded page title or section path next to each heading |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/CopySectLink.js]] }} This script adds a button that copies the unencoded page title (with spaces, not underscores) or section path (with #) to your clipboard so it can be pasted as a clean wikilink, next to the [{{fake link|edit}}] link in each heading. If the edit link doesn't exist, it creates its own brackets. You may also copy the full URL by right-clicking the button and selecting your browser's native "Copy link" option. ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/CopySectLink.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. {{User:Nardog/scripts}}[[Category:reimport]]

{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=CopySectLink |desc=Adds a button to copy the unencoded page title or section path next to each heading |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/CopySectLink.js]] }} This script adds a button that copies the unencoded page title (with spaces, not underscores) or section path (with #) to your clipboard so it can be pasted as a clean wikilink, next to the [{{fake link|edit}}] link in each heading. If the edit link doesn't exist, it creates its own brackets. You may also copy the full URL by right-clicking the button and selecting your browser's native "Copy link" option. ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/CopySectLink.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. {{User:Nardog/scripts}}

{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=CopySectLink |desc=Adds a button to copy the unencoded page title or section path next to each heading |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/CopySectLink.js]] }} This script adds a button that copies the unencoded page title (with spaces, not underscores) or section path (with #) to your clipboard so it can be pasted as a clean wikilink, next to the [{{fake link|edit}}] link in each heading. If the edit link doesn't exist, it creates its own brackets. You may also copy the full URL by right-clicking the button and selecting your browser's native "Copy link" option. ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/CopySectLink.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. {{User:Nardog/scripts}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Nardog%2FCopySectLink here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=CopySectLink |desc=Adds a button to copy the unencoded page title or section path next to each heading |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/CopySectLink.js]] }} This script adds a button that copies the unencoded page title (with spaces, not underscores) or section path (with #) to your clipboard so it can be pasted as a clean wikilink, next to the [{{fake link|edit}}] link in each heading. If the edit link doesn't exist, it creates its own brackets. You may also copy the full URL by right-clicking the button and selecting your browser's native "Copy link" option. ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/CopySectLink.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page. {{User:Nardog/scripts}}
